---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or integration
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Feel free to include example commands, API calls, or pseudocode.

## Affected Components

- [ ] WhatsApp command (`!cmd`)
- [ ] Menu / interactive reply
- [ ] New LLM backend
- [ ] New messenger platform
- [ ] Deployment / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought of and why you preferred this one.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, related issues.
